item.title: Skechers D LITES FRESH START Sneaker Mujer White Leather/Mesh/Silver Trim 39 EU
item.description: Tienes Skechers D LITES FRESH START Sneaker Mujer White Leather/Mesh/Silver Trim 39 EU aqui! 🔎: Tipo de tacón: Plano Material exterior: Cuero Cierre: Cordones 🛒 Comprar!!!
